summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment must obtain ANRT homologation (homologation des équipements radioélectriques et des terminaux de télécommunication) before import or sale in Morocco under Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications and its amendments. The ANRT homologation certificate number must appear on the product label. ETSI and IEC standards are used as technical reference for testing, but an EU CE Declaration of Conformity alone is not accepted by ANRT as a substitute for Moroccan homologation. CCC is not recognised.
summary.zh: 依据摩洛哥邮政与电信法（Loi 24-96）及其修订，所有无线电及电信终端设备须在进口或于摩洛哥销售前取得ANRT型式核准（homologation des équipements radioélectriques et des terminaux de télécommunication）。ANRT型式核准证书编号须标注于产品标签上。测试以ETSI和IEC标准作为技术参考，但欧盟CE符合性声明单独不被ANRT接受，不可替代摩洛哥型式核准。CCC不被承认。
summary.zht: 依據摩洛哥郵政與電信法（Loi 24-96）及其修訂，所有無線電及電信終端裝置須在進口或於摩洛哥銷售前取得ANRT型式核准（homologation des équipements radioélectriques et des terminaux de télécommunication）。ANRT型式核准證書編號須標注於產品標籤上。測試以ETSI和IEC標準作為技術參考，但歐盟CE符合性聲明單獨不被ANRT接受，不可替代摩洛哥型式核准。CCC不被承認。

standards_or_laws: Loi 24-96 relative à la poste et aux télécommunications (Morocco, as amended)
ANRT homologation procedures for radio and telecom terminal equipment
ETSI EN 300 328 (Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz), ETSI EN 301 893 (Wi-Fi 5 GHz), ETSI EN 300 440 (short-range devices / Bluetooth) — referenced for technical testing
ANRT label requirement: homologation number on product label

summary.en: China requires MIIT/SRRC radio type approval for RF transmitters under MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016, a MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment, and CCC for applicable RF equipment categories. Testing references GB/T standards (GB/T 9254 for EMC, GB 4943.1 for safety). Neither SRRC approval nor CCC is recognised by ANRT.
summary.zh: 中国依据工信部第14号令对射频发射设备要求MIIT/SRRC无线电型号核准，对电信终端设备要求工信部进网许可证（NAL），对适用类别无线设备要求CCC认证。测试参照GB/T标准（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943.1）。SRRC批准和CCC均不被ANRT承认。
summary.zht: 中國依據工信部第14號令對射頻發射設備要求MIIT/SRRC無線電型號核准，對電信終端裝置要求工信部進網許可證（NAL），對適用類別無線設備要求CCC認證。測試參照GB/T標準（EMC：GB/T 9254；安全：GB 4943.1）。SRRC批准和CCC均不被ANRT承認。

standards_or_laws: MIIT/SRRC Radio Type Approval (MIIT Order No. 14 of 2016)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) for telecom terminal equipment
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) for applicable RF equipment

gap.en: ANRT homologation is a fully independent certification from SRRC, CCC, or CE mark — none of these are accepted by ANRT. A fresh application to ANRT with ETSI-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory is required. The ANRT homologation number must be affixed to the product label; absence of the number is an import violation. Morocco's EU Association Agreement facilitates trade alignment but does not extend CE mark recognition to radio homologation.
gap.zh: ANRT型式核准与SRRC、CCC或CE标志完全独立——ANRT不接受上述任何认证。须向ANRT提交全新申请，并提供来自认可实验室的基于ETSI参考标准的测试报告。ANRT型式核准号须贴附于产品标签；未标注者将构成进口违规。摩洛哥与欧盟的联系协定有助于贸易对接，但不将CE标志认可延伸至无线型式核准。
gap.zht: ANRT型式核准與SRRC、CCC或CE標誌完全獨立——ANRT不接受上述任何認證。須向ANRT提交全新申請，並提供來自認可實驗室的基於ETSI參考標準的測試報告。ANRT型式核准號須貼附於產品標籤；未標注者將構成進口違規。摩洛哥與歐盟的聯繫協定有助於貿易對接，但不將CE標誌認可延伸至無線型式核准。

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications (Morocco)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China SRRC approval, CCC, and CE mark do not satisfy ANRT homologation requirements. A separate ANRT homologation process with ETSI-referenced test reports from a recognised laboratory is required before any wireless or telecom terminal device may be imported or sold in Morocco.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国SRRC批准、CCC及CE标志均不满足ANRT型式核准要求。任何无线或电信终端设备在摩洛哥进口或销售前，须另行完成基于ETSI参考测试报告（来自认可实验室）的ANRT型式核准流程。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國SRRC批准、CCC及CE標誌均不滿足ANRT型式核准要求。任何無線或電信終端裝置在摩洛哥進口或銷售前，須另行完成基於ETSI參考測試報告（來自認可實驗室）的ANRT型式核准流程。
